name: mtg-commander-search-cli
description: Local MTG card data and Commander deck-suggestion context tools powered by Scryfall bulk Oracle Cards.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/mtg-commander-search.js && node --check ./bin/mtg-deck-context.js && node --check ./lib/build-commander-search.js && node --check ./lib/search-commander-cards.js && node --check ./src/metrics.js && node --check ./src/build-deck-viz.js && node --check ./src/build-web.js && node --check ./scripts/audit-interaction-coverage.js && node --check ./lib/moxfield-bracket-sample.js && node --check ./lib/bracket-analysis.js && node --check ./data/fetch-moxfield-bracket-sample.js && node --check ./data/validate-wintuning.js && node --check ./data/report-bracket-analysis.js
scripts.test: node ./test/build-commander-search.test.js && node ./test/search-commander-cards.test.js && node ./test/metrics.test.js && node ./test/interaction-model.test.js && node ./test/moxfield-bracket-sample.test.js && node ./test/validate-wintuning.test.js && node ./test/bracket-analysis.test.js
